ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "SMA5" REAL /* 5-day Simple Moving Average */,
  "SMA10" REAL /* 10-day Simple Moving Average */,
  "SMA15" REAL /* 15-day Simple Moving Average */,
  "RMA5" REAL /* 5-day Exponential Moving Average */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the asset traded during the period */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the period */,
  "low_52_week" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset in the last 52 weeks */,
  "high_52_week" REAL /* Highest price of the asset in the last 52 weeks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time", "asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, bond, commodity, cryptocurrency) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the asset is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the asset belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the asset belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the asset is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency the asset is traded in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., SMA, RMA, MACD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the indicator */,
  "input_parameters" TEXT /* Input parameters required for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart (e.g., Line Chart, Bar Chart, Candlestick Chart) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, bar, candlestick) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the alert is for */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification to send (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the historical market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the asset traded during the period */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the asset */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time", "asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the prediction is for */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the asset */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the preference */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the preference is for */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the user prefers */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator the user prefers */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe for the preference (e.g., 1m, 5m, 1h, 1d) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the transaction is for */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the asset was traded */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees charged for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the news is related to */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the news item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news item */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news item */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the user is monitoring */,
  "add_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the asset was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screener_results" (
  "screener_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screener result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the screener */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Name of the screen */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the screener result */,
  "assets" TEXT /* List of assets that passed the screen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screener_result_id")
)
